companyNameJapanese: 東洋合成工業株式会社
description: Manufactures and sells photosensitive materials and polymer products for semiconductors. Products include photoresists for semiconductor microfabrication, LCD materials, and electric double layer materials.

_externalRelationships.notes: 60% market share in KrF/ArF photosensitive materials. 60-70% share in EUV photosensitive materials. Supplies PAGs and polymers for chemically amplified resists since 1997.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, CNBC, Stock Analysis, Toyo Gosei IR
_metadata.notes: Key supplier of photosensitive materials for semiconductor IC and LCD manufacturing processes. Developing EUV photosensitive materials for next-gen nodes.
